productDisplayName: Wrangler Men Applique Polo Maroon T-shirt
description: Composition Maroon and white striped polo T-shirt, made of 100% cotton, has a spread ribbed collar, short sleeves with ribbed cuffs, buttoned chest placket, vented hem, embroidery on the right chest, appliquéd branding on the left chest and right sleeve Fit Comfort Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Designed for the man of regal style, this polo T-shirt from wrangler is made of pure cotton to keep you fresh and comfortable all day. The short ribbed sleeves compliment your well-toned arms, while the vented hem provides a comfortable fit. Team this tee with denims and suede shoes. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height:6' and shoulders:18”
